All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ArmorEquipEvent
Calls when a player equips armor.
ArmorEquipEvent.EquipMethod
The equip method of the item.
ArmorType
Identifies what armor a player has equipped.
BaseItemBuilder<Base extends BaseItemBuilder<Base>>
A base item builder to build everything we need.
ItemBuilder
The parent itembuilder that extends BaseItemBuilder.
ItemChecker
Create a skull using url's/base64 or player names.
ItemNbt
Modify the item nbt.
PaperConsole
A class that represents the console sender.
PaperCore
A paper manager for plugins to create an instance of.
PaperPlayer
Allows to obtain uuids, names or send messages.
PaperPlayerListener
Monitors players when they leave/join the server to update the player registry.
PaperPlayerRegistry
Handles all player information on Paper.
PaperSender
Creates a paper sender.
